---
title: "Tree Maintenance Groups"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.quarto-layout-row { column-gap: 2em; }
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .quarto-layout-row { flex-direction: column; }
  .quarto-layout-cell { width: 100% !important; flex-basis: 100% !important; }
}
</style>
```

For a map that shows all groups with trees, [click here](ShowPolygonAssignments.html).

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source(here::here('Trees/Maintenance/AssignPeopleToTrees.R'))
source(here::here('Trees/Maintenance/MapHelpers.R'))
library(gt)

gpkg_path = here::here('Trees/Maintenance/assignments/Assignments.gpkg')
dat            = load_polygon_assignments(gpkg_path)
polygons       = dat$polygons
trees_assigned = dat$trees_assigned

trees_assigned_summary = trees_assigned |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  summarize(
    recent = sum(count[Year >= 2023]),
    mid    = sum(count[Year >= 2020 & Year <= 2022]),
    early  = sum(count[Year >= 2017 & Year <= 2019]),
    .by    = person_id
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: display
#| layout: [[30, 70]]

# --- Links table -------------------------------------------------------------
n_groups = n_distinct(polygons$person_id)

tibble::tibble(
  Group = seq_len(n_groups),
  Map   = purrr::map(Group, \(i) gt::html(glue::glue(
    '<a href="maps_and_data/Group_{i}_map.html">Map</a>'
  ))),
  CSV   = purrr::map(Group, \(i) gt::html(glue::glue(
    '<a href="maps_and_data/Group_{i}_data.csv" download>CSV</a>'
  )))
) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_align('center', columns = c(Map, CSV)) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = '90%', data_row.padding = '4px') |>
  opt_css('div.gt_container { padding-top: 0 !important; }')

# --- Map ---------------------------------------------------------------------
polygons_4326    = polygons |> st_transform(4326)
polygons_labeled = make_polygon_labels(polygons_4326, trees_assigned_summary)
polygon_centroids = polygons_labeled |> st_centroid()

leaflet(width = '100%', height = '80vh') |>
  addProviderTiles('CartoDB.Positron') |>
  addPolygons(
    data        = polygons_labeled,
    fillColor   = ~color,
    stroke      = FALSE,
    fillOpacity = 0.3,
    label       = ~label
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    data         = polygon_centroids,
    icon         = transparent_icon,
    label        = ~as.character(person_id),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(
      permanent = TRUE,
      noHide    = TRUE,
      direction = 'center',
      textOnly  = TRUE,
      style     = list('font-weight' = 'bold', 'font-size' = '13px', 'color' = '#333')
    )
  )
```
